scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome116 --outfile=dist/content.js && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/setup.html dist/setup.html && node scripts/verify-build-output.mjs
scripts.dev: echo "Chrome extension dev workflow is not implemented yet"
